posts.name: ClawTeams
posts.tagline: The first goal-driven, proactive AI team for e-commerce
posts.description: ClawTeams is an AI employee platform for e-commerce sellers. Instead of hiring specialists—or doing everything yourself—you get a coordinated AI team that thinks, plans, and executes like real employees. One goal. One team. Zero micromanagement. Tell your team lead what you want—"Increase Q4 revenue by 20%"—and they break it down, assign specialists, and run the plan. You get updates in Slack or Discord. High-stakes decisions wait for your approval. Everything else just happens.

posts.name: Pazi
posts.tagline: Vibe code business operations
posts.description: Pazi is an AI team for that idea you keep coming back to — a book, a shop, an app, a skill you want to sell. Tell Pazi what you're trying to do and it builds a team of agents around your idea and starts making things happen: a website, first outreach, content, the next step. Every time you come back, something has moved. You stay in control; your team does the rest alongside you, one real step at a time. Like vibe coding but for business operations.

posts.name: Goose Ads Remixer
posts.tagline: Remix the ads already winning in your niche
posts.description: The winning ads in your niche reveal what works: hooks, offers, copy structures, layouts. Goose learns those patterns and creates new ads for your brand with your real logo, product images, and messaging in minutes. First 10 ads free.

makers.name: Soham Mehta
makers.headline: Goose runs your Meta ads end to end

posts.name: PgDog
posts.tagline: Scale PostgreSQL without changing your app
posts.description: PgDog is an open source connection pooler, load balancer, and sharding proxy for PostgreSQL. It's Postgres-compliant, fast, secure and built in the open by a community of database engineers.

makers.name: Lev Kokotov
makers.headline: PgDog founder, Postgres and Rust nerd.

posts.name: Agentcard for companies
posts.tagline: Give your agent a debit card
posts.description: Give your AI agent a debit card. Issue single-use cards funded from your wallet with a fixed budget so your agents can buy things online.

posts.name: Portero
posts.tagline: Know exactly what's running on every port of your Mac
posts.description: Portero is a free, open source Mac app that shows every open port and the process behind it. See what's running, kill processes on busy ports, fix 'address already in use' errors, and block ports with the built-in macOS firewall.

posts.name: Claude Overlay
posts.tagline: A floating Claude Code chat that sees your screen
posts.description: Claude Overlay is a frameless, always-on-top chat window for Claude Code that floats over everything you do. Summon it with a hotkey, ask about whatever's on screen, and Claude captures and reads your monitors before answering. It runs the full Claude Code agent on your own subscription - no API key - so it can edit files and run commands, not just chat. Open source (MIT), Windows.

posts.name: Branda
posts.tagline: Turn any domain into on-brand ads, MIT Open Source
posts.description: Branda turns any website URL into scroll-stopping, on-brand ads in seconds. Paste a link and Branda pulls the brand's real logo, colors, and campaign imagery via Context.dev's Brand API, reads the homepage so the copy sounds like the brand, and generates ready-to-ship creatives for LinkedIn and X. No login, no design skills, no assets to upload. Open-source and self-hostable.

posts.name: BugShot
posts.tagline: Discover, fix, capture, and report bugs in one shot
posts.description: Catch a bug and file a complete report from Chrome's side panel. Captures, console/network logs, and environment attach automatically. Or tweak the CSS live and send the before/after side by side. AI drafts it for you. Free, no account, straight to your tracker.

posts.name: Animos App
posts.tagline: Showcase your designs in motion
posts.description: Present your work with high-quality motion in under 1 minute. Animos is a browser-based animation tool built for creators. The workflow is simple: pick a template, drop in your assets, tweak, and export. With 30+ templates, 4K resolution, and MP4/WebM support, you can easily generate stunning, web-ready animations for your portfolio.

posts.name: Sales Studio
posts.tagline: Private studio for live demos on macOS
posts.description: Sales Studio is a private studio for live demos on macOS. Your audience sees one clean, polished screen share in Zoom, Meet, or Teams. You see your script, notes, talking points, and every display you might switch to. No more window juggling.

posts.name: Flyout
posts.tagline: Rich-text notes that fly out from your Mac's screen edge
posts.description: Nudge your screen edge — or press ⌥⌘N — and a full rich-text editor flies out over whatever you're doing. Checklists, reminders, folders, images, code blocks, iCloud sync. Native macOS, not Electron. Lifetime license, 7-day free trial. Every note is plain Markdown underneath. Your notes never touch our servers.

posts.name: VocalVia
posts.tagline: Turn documents and articles into editable multi-voice audio
posts.description: VocalVia turns PDFs, Word files, Markdown, web articles, and pasted text into structured outlines, editable podcast scripts, and natural multi-voice audio. Choose speakers and voices, refine individual segments, then export the finished audio. It is built for saved reading, study notes, research papers, and long-form content you want to listen to away from a screen.

posts.name: Altersend
posts.tagline: File transfer with no cloud storage, no account, no limits
posts.description: AlterSend sends files directly between devices - P2P, E2EE, no cloud storage, no account, no size limits. Open source and cross-platform: mobile + desktop. Share a code or scan a QR, and files stream straight across.

posts.name: AutoShelf 2.0
posts.tagline: Auto-organize files on your Mac now with MCP & CLI support
posts.description: AutoShelf is a macOS app that watches your folders and auto-organizes files. Set a rule once and never think about it again. Free to try, unlock unlimited for $19.99.

posts.name: Breva
posts.tagline: Turn your Mac trackpad into a gentle breathing guide
posts.description: Breva turns your Mac trackpad into a gentle breathing guide. Choose a breathing pattern, set a session length, and follow a soft expanding orb with optional audio and haptic cues. It works locally, needs no account, and helps you take short reset breaks without reaching for your phone.

posts.name: Trump Accounts
posts.tagline: Build long-term financial security for your child
posts.description: Trump Accounts help eligible American children begin building long-term financial growth from an early age. Eligible children born between 2025–2028 can qualify for an initial $1,000 U.S. Treasury contribution beginning July 4, 2026. The account features a pilot program contribution of $1,000 for children born between Jan. 1, 2025, and Dec. 31, 2028, and who are U.S. citizens with a valid Social Security number.

posts.name: ClipFlow
posts.tagline: Small video jobs, without a timeline
posts.description: ClipFlow handles the small video jobs that do not need a timeline. Trim, join, compress, reverse, filter, caption, mute, blur, or convert a clip, then continue with the result. Version 1.9 adds partial reverse and 13 filter styles. Most processing runs on device.

posts.name: Sourclip
posts.tagline: Turn NotebookLM into a complete research workflow
posts.description: Sourclip is the research workflow for NotebookLM. It helps you discover high-quality research sources, capture webpages, PDFs, YouTube videos, Reddit posts, and AI chats into NotebookLM with one click. Organize everything with folders, reuse prompts across projects, sync your workspace across devices, and export your research as Markdown, HTML, or PDF. You can also turn NotebookLM Audio Overviews into a private podcast feed for Spotify, Apple Podcasts, Pocket Casts, and other podcast apps.

posts.name: Mojave Paint
posts.tagline: Direct manipulation of static images on the Mac platform
posts.description: Bitmap images are still, even in 2026, a hugely important medium of communication. Which is why I made Mojave Paint – a Mac-based image editor that lets you really own the production of these bitmap images. They've been making image editors since the original Mac and the Amiga and I'm sure even long before that. But somehow the choices in the modern era fall short. So I have a new option, presented by an upstart software shop in Seattle. If you're looking for AI features, look elsewhere.

makers.name: John Simons
makers.headline: Mac apps built in Seattle and High Dez

posts.name: loopclub
posts.tagline: The shared drum machine to jam with strangers or with Claude
posts.description: loopclub is a realtime, onchain drum machine — beat-making turned into a multiplayer, ownable act. Sporting a 16-step, 9-track sequencer running entirely onchain. The grid updates live as other people claim cells around you, so a loop is built collaboratively, in real time. Record a loop you like and every cell owner earns on each copy pressed. Or ask Claude to write you one. Listening and auditioning are free. Fully open source at https://github.com/mintcloud/loopclub

posts.name: DevAlly MCP
posts.tagline: Accessibility compliance within your AI workflow
posts.description: DevAlly MCP connects your accessibility compliance data to any AI assistant that supports MCP: Claude, Claude Code, Cursor, ChatGPT, Codex and many more. Ask "show me all critical issues on checkout" or "what is the fix for DEV-2487" and get the WCAG criterion, the offending code, and the recommended fix, without leaving your editor. Triage issues, trigger audits, and build reports by asking. Available on the Growth and Compliance plans, OAuth sign-in, connected in under 60 seconds.

posts.name: Notte - Privacy-first Workspace
posts.tagline: Notes, tasks, calendar, and AI in one E2E encrypted app.
posts.description: Notes, tasks, calendar, and AI in one E2EE (end-to-end encrypted) app. Built 100% native for every platform to give you ultimate speed, full offline mode, and great battery life.

posts.name: VibeSong
posts.tagline: Find the perfect soundtrack for every photo
posts.description: 📸 VibeSong is an AI-powered music discovery app that finds the perfect soundtrack for any photo. Upload an image, and AI analyzes its mood, lighting, colors, and overall vibe to recommend songs that actually fit the moment. Swipe through personalized recommendations, save your favorites, and stop spending more time searching for music than sharing your memories.

posts.name: ChessWoodie
posts.tagline: Chess tactics training inspired by the Woodpecker Method
posts.description: ChessWoodie is a chess tactics trainer built around structured repetition. Instead of solving random puzzles, you train using courses where the same positions repeat across cycles, helping patterns become automatic. Inspired by the Woodpecker Method, it focuses on building fast pattern recognition through deliberate practice.

posts.name: Shaders
posts.tagline: The design platform for web shaders
posts.description: Shaders is the design platform for web shaders. Create stunning WebGPU-powered effects with a pro-grade visual editor, then export clean component code for Vue, React, Svelte, Solid, JavaScript, and Framer. Trusted by 10,000+ design engineers to ship beautiful, production-ready frontend experiences.

posts.name: Surge
posts.tagline: An AI growth agent that researches and plans your content
posts.description: Surge researches your startup, competitors, and public company information, remembers what it learns, and turns that context into an editable weekly plan with social posts and short-form video briefs.

posts.name: ThePackt
posts.tagline: ⚔️ The natural way to grow without an audience ⚔️
posts.description: Hark, weary builder. 🐺 You built for months, then launched into silence, no crowd, no soul to tell. ThePackt is the guild you were missing. Post a quest, fellow founders answer the call, prove the deed, and you reward them with Honor and real reputation, never traded, never faked. No audience, no budget, no gatekeepers. One for all, all for one!!! The pack has your back. The fight for Honor is hard, but here, no one fights alone. ⚔

posts.name: Let Me Cook
posts.tagline: Less deciding. More cooking
posts.description: let me cook turns "what do I even make?" into "dinner's on the table." It's a decision-first cooking coach — like Duolingo, but for cooking. Tell it what you've got and how you feel, and it proposes 2–3 doable dishes instead of overwhelming you with a thousand recipes. Once you pick one, it guides you through prep and cooking one step at a time, calmly, with a one-sentence reason behind each move. The result: less stress, real confidence in the kitchen, and skills that actually stick.

posts.name: Optio: AI Decision Maker
posts.tagline: Optio 2.0:AI decision-making with video export
posts.description: Optio 2.0 is your ultimate cyberpunk decision hub, now on iOS & Android! 🤖 Opsis AI: Instantly generate choices & regenerate with a tap. 📅 Smart Scanner: Sync calendar for holiday & special event alerts. 🪄 Magic Mode: Triple-tap to secretly pre-select the winner. 🎥 Video Sharing: Export spins as vertical videos with synced audio & confetti. 🎲 Quick Tools: Coin flip, dice roll, random number & letter tools. Fully localized in 10+ languages!

posts.name: JobCubby
posts.tagline: Run your job search like it's your job
posts.description: JobCubby is a job-search command center: track every application from saved to offer, with AI that assists but never impersonates you — tailored cover letters, screening-answer prep, résumé feedback and interview practice. Unlike generic trackers, it has a built-in job feed and ships its own MCP server, so you can run your entire search from Claude or any AI assistant. Autopilot watches new postings and preps applications for you. Free to start.

posts.name: MinuteFile
posts.tagline: Turn meetings into searchable transcripts. All local
posts.description: MinuteFile turns local meeting recording folders into private, searchable transcripts on your Mac. No account, upload, meeting bot, or subscription.

posts.name: Nottle
posts.tagline: A 2-minute daily mood check-in with gentle AI insights
posts.description: Nottle is a 2-minute daily reflection app for iOS and Android. Unlike journaling apps that demand writing, or trackers built around streaks, Nottle asks for just a mood, maybe a few signals, then quietly reflects patterns back over time. No streaks, no pressure, no long journaling. Fully private by default.

posts.name: Kibo
posts.tagline: AI habit tracker that makes achieving your goals easy
posts.description: Kibo fills the gap between a $5 habit tracker and a $500/month human coach. It's an AI life coach that turns your goals into personalized weekly commitments, tracks your follow-through, and leads weekly review sessions to adjusts your program based on your results and your feedback. Not a chatbot that forgets you between sessions — a coaching system that remembers everything and evolves with you. Built solo with Claude Code by a PM who wanted a coach he'd actually stick with.

posts.name: Narrly
posts.tagline: Your child, the hero — read in the voice they love
posts.description: Narrly turns your child into the hero of their own illustrated bedtime story — each one teaching a real value like courage, kindness or honesty. The magic: every tale can be narrated in YOUR own recorded voice or a favorite character's, so bedtime feels personal. Free unlimited folk-tale library (including Kazakh classics), 8 languages, first story free. Built solo by a 17-year-old founder.

posts.name: Meltbox
posts.tagline: Inbox for briefs from your agents. Better human in the loop.
posts.description: Meltbox is an inbox for context-rich interactive briefs from your agents. Right now when an agent needs you, you end up having to look through terminal scrollback, localhost tabs, and Slack DMs to yourself. In Meltbox, your agents push small interactive pages with all the context you need to make a decision. You triage briefs in a keyboard-fast inbox, tap an answer, and your reply flows straight back to the agent.

makers.name: William Wnekowicz
makers.headline: Always building || prev: CTO @ BOND, KP

posts.name: OpenHive
posts.tagline: GTM agents with sales playbook
posts.description: Delegate to a colony of worker agents to execute, and run your marketing and sales playbook reliably. Local-first, route to top LLM models, and easy to use.

posts.name: Battery Sensei
posts.tagline: Be Zen about your Meetings
posts.description: Battery Sensei is the menu bar app I wanted but couldn’t find. - Meeting Guard checks the next few hours of your calendar and warns you if your Mac won’t make it through a meeting. - Set your own low-battery warnings - Pause charging at a custom limits or when the battery gets hot - See battery health, where the power is going, and if you charge at full speed However, most importantly, most of the time, it just sits quietly in the background, monitoring and giving you peace of mind.

posts.name: German Vault
posts.tagline: Learn German: verbs, grammar, AI quizzes & more
posts.description: Learning German is fragmented — verb tables in one app, grammar in another, slang nowhere. GermanVault puts everything in one place: 9-tense verb conjugations, structured grammar lessons, real idioms, visual vocabulary, and AI-quizzes that adapt to your level. Built for learners from A1-B1, with spaced-repetition daily review, a streak system, 27 achievement badges, and offline access. Free on Android — premium unlocks unlimited collections, AI quiz hints & full progress analytics.

makers.name: Chirag Mendapara
makers.headline: Founder of HybFalcon and exp. Developer

posts.name: PDF Engineer
posts.tagline: Stop uploading sensitive files to cloud servers.
posts.description: PDF Engineer is the ultimate, privacy-first workstation designed to handle all your PDF tasks 100% locally on your computer. No data ever leaves your device. No file size restrictions. No registration.

posts.name: Stand
posts.tagline: AI website chat that pulls you in when it matters
posts.description: Most website chat tools minimize human workload. Stand does the opposite: it helps product leaders learn from visitor conversations. What didn’t visitors understand? Why didn’t they convert? An AI stand-in answers questions 24/7, spots conversations worth joining, and brings you in with full context. It turns chats into product discovery insights you can trace back to the source. Free for 15 AI chats a week, with no credit card.

makers.name: Joonas Lehtinen
makers.headline: Web. Open Source. Enterpreuner. CS PhD.

posts.name: Equana — Numerical Computing
posts.tagline: Numerical Computing. Instantly.
posts.description: Zero build time. Zero compilation. Zero data transfers. Instant numerical computing that runs entirely in your browser.

posts.name: Battery Sensei
posts.tagline: Be Zen about your Meetings
posts.description: Battery Sensei is the menu bar app I wanted but couldn’t find. - Meeting Guard checks the next few hours of your calendar and warns you if your Mac won’t make it through a meeting. - Set your own low-battery warnings - Pause charging at a custom limits or when the battery gets hot - See battery health, where the power is going, and if you charge at full speed However, most importantly, most of the time, it just sits quietly in the background, monitoring and giving you peace of mind.

posts.name: Onboardy
posts.tagline: Repo context workbench for humans and AI agents
posts.description: Turn GitHub repositories into navigable context maps, guides, evidence, and scoped chat. Onboardy helps developers and AI coding agents understand unfamiliar GitHub repos faster. It generates architecture maps, files to read first, evidence-backed guides, ownership clues, scoped chat, and MCP-ready context so you can move through larger codebases and multi-repo projects with less setup time.

posts.name: CliPad
posts.tagline: ClipPad is AI organizational memory for company knowledge!!
posts.description: Hey Product Hunt! 👋 I'm Yussif Abdul-Jalil, CEO & Co-Founder of Optavel. Excited to introduce ClipPad — the AI-powered organizational memory platform that captures, connects, and preserves your company's knowledge—through meetings, async video, collaboration, and intelligent context. Teams create valuable knowledge, but it often gets lost. ClipPad helps teams capture, organize, and search knowledge with AI, keeping everyone aligned and working smarter. We'd love your feedback and support!

posts.name: Statlyzer
posts.tagline: Pure mathematical football analytics.
posts.description: A transparent football analytics engine powered by Poisson, Dixon-Coles & Monte Carlo simulations. We calculate exact probabilities across 8 variables. Key features: 1. Past Analyst: We log yesterday’s AI predictions vs actual results. Total transparency, no hidden misses. 2. Freemium: Get 2 Free Credits daily to fully analyze any 2 matches worldwide!

posts.name: Are you found by AI?
posts.tagline: See if AI recommends your business: free, in 60 seconds
posts.description: Does ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity or Google's AI recommend your business when customers ask? Free scan, no signup. 600+ businesses measured into a live index. Human-reviewed report US$79 once, with an AI-traffic beacon that counts the visitors AI actually sends you.

makers.name: Huxley Peckham
makers.headline: I measure whether AI recommends you

posts.name: VisionBoardAI
posts.tagline: The Identity Operating System for ambitious people.
posts.description: The gap between who you want to become and how you live each day isn’t a character flaw—it’s a systems problem. VisionBoardAI builds an evolving Identity Graph from your goals, actions, reflections, and connected context—including Oura, Notion, and ChatGPT—then turns it into adaptive daily protocols calibrated to your real capacity. Unlike static tools, it scales your plan when life changes, preserves momentum on hard days, and learns what actually helps you follow through.

posts.name: Sorank
posts.tagline: Grow organic traffic from Google and AI, on autopilot.
posts.description: Search is splitting in two: Google results and AI answers that cite only a few sources. Sorank runs the full content engine for both. It finds high-intent keywords, writes AI-first articles, auto-publishes to your CMS, builds high-authority backlinks, and tracks who gets cited across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini and Grok. The only tool that connects what you publish to what AI actually cites. Set it once, grow on autopilot.

makers.name: Adrien Hanot
makers.headline: Co-Founder & CTO Sorank SEO on autopilot

posts.name: GemType
posts.tagline: Free, open-source Grammarly alternative powered by Gemini
posts.description: GemType checks your grammar and rewrites text on any website — Gmail, LinkedIn, X, Reddit, anywhere. Like Grammarly, but free and open source: you plug in your own free Google Gemini API key. No account, no subscription, no tracking.

posts.name: Estimate Poker
posts.tagline: Planning poker for agile teams. No account, free & real-time
posts.description: Estimate Poker is free, real-time planning poker for agile teams. Create a room, share a link or QR code, and your team votes on story points together, then reveals at the same time so no one anchors on the first number. No accounts, no installs. Scrum, Fibonacci, T-shirt, and custom decks, with instant agreement and average after every round. Free real-time planning poker for agile teams. No accounts, no installs, consensus in minutes.

posts.name: JobTether
posts.tagline: Your resume is probably losing to a bot.
posts.description: JobTether is an AI career copilot that gives your resume a brutally honest roast, a deduction-based ATS score, and a clear fix report. It also includes a LinkedIn optimizer, AI mock interviews, and a job application tracker. Free roast, no signup tricks — built for freshers and job seekers.

posts.name: Territory News
posts.tagline: The free Google Alerts alternative for AEs.
posts.description: Territory News watches your accounts for you. Funding, leadership changes, expansions, bad quarters. When something happens at a company in your territory, you get the trigger and a reason to reach out that isn't "just checking in." Free for AEs. Available to US users.

posts.name: Frontstore
posts.tagline: Create an online store in under 2 minutes and start selling.
posts.description: Build your store in under 2 minutes. Automate order taking, handle checkout inside WhatsApp, and manage payments and delivery with Frontstore.

posts.name: manic — animation language
posts.tagline: Turn a few lines of code into explainer videos
posts.description: manic is a tiny text language for animations. Describe the shapes and what happens over time — no timeline, no keyframes — and it renders a smooth MP4. Built for math, algorithm geometry & CS explainers. Write and render right in your browser

posts.name: AdSense No More rejections
posts.tagline: Fix AdSense issues before submitting your website
posts.description: Analyze your website against Google AdSense's real approval criteria, fix what's blocking you, and get approved faster. Complete with actionable recommendations

posts.name: Reminder Joe
posts.tagline: Text it. Joe will remind you.
posts.description: Unlike most reminder apps, Reminder Joe works by text. Text "Call parents tomorrow at 3pm". Joe confirms it, then texts you back at 3. That's it. No app. No signup to start. No new system to maintain. Free includes 5 reminders a month, forever. Premium adds unlimited, repeating reminders, and some extras. Simple to try - just text "Hey Joe" to +1 (844) 701-0203

posts.name: MechanixCalc
posts.tagline: 50 ISO/ASME engineering calculators with shareable reports
posts.description: MechanixCalc runs the actual governing standards — ISO 6336 gears, ISO 281 bearings, VDI 2230 bolts, DIN 743 shafts, ASME VIII vessels, EN 1993-1-8 welds and more — in your browser. What's different: every one of the 50 tools cites its standard, shows the formula and a worked example, and exports a branded PDF report a reviewer can follow. It's the bridge between a free single-answer calculator and $10k desktop software like KISSsoft/MITCalc. No install; free 30-min preview, no sign-up.

posts.name: SecureWatch
posts.tagline: Website security scanner — 60 seconds, 75+ tests + features
posts.description: AI attackers exploit vulnerabilities in hours. SecureWatch gives you instant visibility — 75+ tests covering OWASP Top 10, SSL, open ports, and misconfigurations. Scan any domain in 60 seconds. No signup. No credit card. Get a security score and clear, actionable fixes. Built for founders who ship fast but need to ship safe. 👉 https://securewatchonline.com

posts.name: PrivateTake
posts.tagline: PrivateTake records, edits and exports video locally.
posts.description: PrivateTake records, edits and exports video locally. Zero uploads, no cloud storage. Free webcam PiP recorder; Pro adds timed redactions, text overlays and MP4 on your device.

posts.name: Aokumo AI
posts.tagline: Trusted AI agents for enterprise operations
posts.description: Most AI agents can suggest actions. Few can safely execute them in production. Aokumo AI provides the governance, approval, rollback, audit trail, and execution layer that enterprises need to deploy AI agents across cloud infrastructure, DevOps, security, and IT operations. Teams can automate operational workflows while maintaining human oversight, compliance, and control. Built for enterprises that want AI agents to do more than chat.

posts.name: SecureWatch
posts.tagline: Website security scanner — 60 seconds, 75+ tests + features
posts.description: AI attackers exploit vulnerabilities in hours. SecureWatch gives you instant visibility — 75+ tests covering OWASP Top 10, SSL, open ports, and misconfigurations. Scan any domain in 60 seconds. No signup. No credit card. Get a security score and clear, actionable fixes. Built for founders who ship fast but need to ship safe. 👉 https://securewatchonline.com

posts.name: Picxle
posts.tagline: The daily puzzle where wrong guesses sharpen the picture
posts.description: Picxle is a daily image-guessing game. One photo starts as a 64-pixel blur, every wrong guess sharpens it, and you get 5 tries before it fully resolves. Streaks, stats, and a spoiler-free emoji share grid. Free, no ads, on web and Google Play.

posts.name: PrivateTake
posts.tagline: PrivateTake records, edits and exports video locally.
posts.description: PrivateTake records, edits and exports video locally. Zero uploads, no cloud storage. Free webcam PiP recorder; Pro adds timed redactions, text overlays and MP4 on your device.

posts.name: Upstream.so
posts.tagline: Multistream, host live shows, and automate broadcasts
posts.description: Upstream is a cloud live streaming operations platform. Multistream one feed across multiple services, host guest shows in Live Studio, schedule recorded broadcasts, run 24/7 channels, or automate streams through an API. The free plan includes 24 hours/month.

posts.name: Popkorn
posts.tagline: A Portable CSS-like format for interactive motion graphics
posts.description: A portable format for motion graphics — write scenes in familiar CSS, run the same file on web and native mobile. The AI-Friendly syntax of CSS makes it easy to generate entire scenes or edit animations using natural language. You can convert your existing Lottie or SVG animations easily with the built-in converter.

posts.name: Tagglo
posts.tagline: The GTM UI you wish Google built
posts.description: Google Tag Manager, but better. Tagglo is a Chrome extension that improves the GTM UI so managing your container feels effortless. Search, filter, navigate, and debug faster — across every page you already use. Built by GTM practitioners who got tired of the workarounds. Free to install. No account required.

posts.name: CodeMaya
posts.tagline: Platform that creates AI agents.
posts.description: Codemaya builds autonomous AI agents, custom web apps, and mobile solutions to automate unpredictable business processes and scale your startup.

posts.name: Patter SDK
posts.tagline: open-source SDK that gives your AI agent a phone number
posts.description: Open-source voice-AI SDK. The Vapi/Retell alternative for builders who want to own the stack. Give your AI agent a phone number in 4 lines — Python and TypeScript, MIT licensed, Twilio, Telnyx, and Plivo. - PatterAI/Patter

posts.name: Doxad
posts.tagline: Free online document converter - no signup,
posts.description: Free document tools that run in your browser: convert PDF to Word or PowerPoint, merge, split, fill and sign PDFs, compress images, and more. No sign-up, no watermarks.

posts.name: DropReady Media
posts.tagline: Make iPhone photos and videos ready to upload
posts.description: DropReady Media is a Mac app that helps you convert iPhone photos and videos into upload-friendly formats and sizes. Drop HEIC photos or large videos, choose the sharing size, and export files that are easier to upload to SaaS tools, forms, chats, and web services. Everything is processed locally on your Mac.

posts.name: Idea Vault
posts.tagline: Capture ideas before they're forgotten.
posts.description: Great ideas rarely arrive when you're sitting at your desk—and they're easy to forget. Idea Vault helps you capture, organize, and develop your ideas in one place, so they're ready whenever inspiration returns. Whether you're an entrepreneur, writer, developer, or creator, it's designed to stop great ideas from slipping away. Because great ideas deserve better than sticky notes.

posts.name: DiskLens
posts.tagline: See where your storage went — and reclaim it
posts.description: DiskLens is a fast, native disk space analyzer for macOS. Scan any folder or your whole disk and see what's using space with interactive treemap, sunburst, search and duplicate detection.

posts.name: Purge
posts.tagline: Free up your Mac. Safely.
posts.description: A free, open source MacOS utility that finds the caches and forgotten files eating your disk and clears them to the trash. Nothing leaves the trash.

posts.name: ScrollToll - Screen-Time Gym
posts.tagline: The AI Screen Time Blocker That Requires Physical Exercise.

posts.name: CAFE — Compound-AI Factorial Evaluation
posts.tagline: Stop guessing which AI config is better. Prove it.
posts.description: CAFE treats every knob in your AI pipeline - retrieval, reranking, prompts, models, and tools - as an experimental factor. It runs factorial experiments, evaluates outputs using a configurable LLM (and optionally human reviewers), and applies mixed-effects models to determine: - Which techniques actually improve quality - How much each technique contributes - Whether the observed differences are statistically significant Open source and self-hostable.

This website was created to preserve and share the archive more broadly, and to make these pieces of California history accessible for others to study and enjoy.

It downloads a real TCP stream from the server, samples every 500ms to measure the throughput, and monitors if the transmission drops below 2.5 Mbps to detect interruptions.

posts.name: NanoScene AI
posts.tagline: Ultra-fast AI image generator powered by Nano Banana 2 Lite.
posts.description: NanoScene AI is an ultra-fast, cost-efficient AI image generator and editor. Powered by the distilled Nano Banana 2 Lite model, it reduces generation times to just ~4 seconds without compromising quality. Unlike bloated legacy platforms that charge hefty fees, we offer a fast browser workflow with built-in character consistency, background removal, and a K-level upscaler to rebuild details up to 4K/8K. Perfect for creators and devs who need rapid, high-quality visual prototyping.

posts.tagline: An AI chief of staff for people managers, on device

The public demo uses synthetic data; findings are opportunities to investigate, not claimed recovered revenue.

posts.name: Anvil SDK
posts.tagline: The Next.js of AI backends
posts.description: Anvil is a backend framework built for a world where APIs get called by both browsers and AI agents. Write one route file, you get a REST endpoint, an MCP tool, and an A2A skill, all sharing the same schema, checked at build time. No hand-wiring MCP SDKs on top of Express, no duplicating validation across three layers.

posts.name: StreamTest
posts.tagline: Detect cuts in your internet connection, not just speed
posts.description: I use apps to watch live sports events, and I frequently experience transmission failures. I wanted to have proof that demonstrated how the internet transmission was failing, not just the result of my internet speed but how it was maintaining bandwidth, and to know if it was the cause of the interruptions and freezes. It downloads a real TCP stream from the server, samples every 500ms to measure the throughput, and monitors if the transmission drops below 2.5 Mbps to detect interruptions.

posts.name: AI Vault
posts.tagline: Highlight GPT text, hit Save. It's a file on your computer.

posts.name: makeBIMI
posts.tagline: Free BIMI SVG converter. Your logo in Gmail and Apple Mail.
posts.description: BIMI puts your verified brand logo in Gmail and Apple Mail inboxes. The hard part is the SVG format — it must be W3C SVG Tiny P/S compliant, which your existing logo almost certainly isn't. makeBIMI converts any PNG, JPG, or SVG to a strict W3C-compliant BIMI file — free, no account required. It also runs a DMARC audit and generates your DNS TXT record. For the VMC or CMC certificate that Gmail requires, veriBIMI.com handles the full brokerage process.

posts.name: Calendapt
posts.tagline: Calendar, tasks, and progress tracking

Just math, history, and transparent data. Built by a solo indie dev. Looking for real traders to roast my product and tell me what's broken. Your feedback = my roadmap.

Anyone, anywhere can pay you. Why QBitFlow? The second your customer pays, the money is yours: straight to your wallet, you hold the keys, no chargebacks, we never touch it. Everything is on-chain and verifiable — not an obscure processor you have to trust. One-time payments, real subscriptions, and marketplaces. Live in minutes, 1.5% flat.

posts.name: ternbook
posts.tagline: A web directory for the modern web.

Also has robust security measures and a pretty good search function. Easy to join too, add a json file in your /.well-known/ directory and do a POST request to an instance and you're good to go, your website gets shown! 98% of the codebase is generated using LLM based coding agents.

Before it reports a problem it writes a failing test to prove the problem is real. Before a fix reaches you it runs the repo's own tests, build, and lint. The free plan is a mini audit, 5 findings, and 5 fixes a month.

It covers birthdays, name days across 6 European calendars, memorials, anniversaries, pets and custom reminders, with notifications on the day or up to 14 days ahead. Import contacts or a file, export anytime. Offline-first, 7 languages, optional Google Drive backup, light and dark mode.

makers.name: Brothers in Games

posts.tagline: Forward a booking email. Get your whole trip in one place.
posts.description: The average adventure traveller juggles 6+ tools to plan one trip: WhatsApp, spreadsheets, TripIt, Splitwise, email. Venture replaces them. Forward your first booking email and we build your itinerary. Plan, pack, split costs, and travel, solo or with a group. Free.

posts.name: CartBudget
posts.tagline: Track your grocery spending and stay on budget.
posts.description: Last year I realized I was spending over $1,200 every month on groceries without knowing where my money was going. After tracking my spending, I reduced it to around $500 per month. That experience inspired me to build CartBudget. It helps you create shopping lists, set weekly or monthly budgets, track your spending as you shop, and review monthly spending reports so you can make smarter decisions and save money over time.

posts.name: Cloudnan
posts.tagline: Talk to your server and it does the work
posts.description: Cloudnan is a premium server management platform: one-click GitHub/Docker deploys, live metrics, databases, domains + DNS, automatic SSL, backups, and firewall, all behind an agent that connects over mTLS (no inbound port, no SSH). Connect a server from any cloud provider, or rent a managed VM from DigitalOcean, Hetzner, Vultr or Linode by the hour. Prefer not to click? Just ask the built-in AI: "deploy this repo", "why is my site down", "migrate my Supabase". It does the work.

posts.name: AssetFilm
posts.tagline: Turn your product's 3D model into a cinematic video
posts.description: Upload your product's GLB file, pick studio camera shots, and download a finished MP4, rendered from your exact 3D asset. Same geometry, same logo, every time. Unlike AI video, re-renders are identical. First two shot renders free, no card needed.

posts.name: Become Unstoppable | The Complete Notion
posts.tagline: Become Unstoppable | The Complete Notion Productivity Hub
posts.description: Perfect For • Entrepreneurs & Business Owners • Students & Professionals • Freelancers & Creators • Productivity Enthusiasts • Anyone who wants to build better habits and accomplish more every day Features ✨ Clean, modern, minimalist design ✨ Fully editable HTML dashboard ✨ Easy to customize ✨ Print-friend ✨ Responsive layout ✨ Interactive navigation ✨ Progress tracking ✨ Reusable year after year Why You'll Love It - Stay organized without feeling overwhelmed.

It shows your hidden costs in terms of potential money lost, time wasted and most importantly - your personalized goals. Plus it helps you stop wasting as much time so you can increase the likelihood of getting closer to your goals.

posts.name: VidForYou
posts.tagline: Download any video from TikTok, Instagram & more — free
posts.description: Most video downloaders bury you in redirect ads, popups, and sketchy install prompts before you even get your video. VidForYou skips all that: - Paste any link → get your video directly, no chained redirects - Works with TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, Twitter/X, Pinterest & Vimeo - No account, no app install required - Chrome extension included — a download button appears right on the video as you scroll - Videos are streamed directly, never stored on our servers

posts.name: GeoBoost
posts.tagline: One-key GeoGuessr helper for practice and private rounds
posts.description: GeoGuessr Boost is a Chrome extension for GeoGuessr and OpenGuessr practice or private rounds. Press G in a supported round to see the location, open a map preview, and optionally place the pin. Free users get starter guesses and daily use; Pro adds unlimited use, Smart Zoom, Range, and Auto Place controls. Independent product, not affiliated with GeoGuessr.

posts.name: Codeflow
posts.tagline: tree-sitter, CodeMirror, no install
posts.description: Open an unfamiliar folder and CodeFlow unfolds it into an interactive node graph you can actually read — a semantic map grouped by feature, or a physical map ranked by importance. Change the flow on the canvas — add, delete, reconnect, annotate — and it rewrites the real files to match, every change shown as a line-by-line diff you Keep or Undo.

makers.headline: I build the tools I actually need

Our platform provides: ✅ Curated Bangalore B2B Events ✅ Event Discovery & Tracking ✅ Attendee Intelligence ✅ Event Marketing Support Whether you're attending, sponsoring, or organizing an event we helps you maximize ROI from every event.

Unlike existing products that treat every prompt or code review as a new interaction, Sigilix carries that organizational knowledge across its CLI, code review, Slack, and workflow tools.

posts.name: AIQualityHQ

posts.description: AI Quality HQ is a free, deterministic prompt analyzer built for engineering teams. Stop relying on "vibe checks" and expensive API calls to test prompts. Our rule-based engine evaluates AI prompts across 6 dimensions—structure, memory, context, trust, privacy, and security—in under 10ms. Get instant quality scores, detect prompt injection risks, flag PII exposure, and receive actionable fixes. Perfect for testing prompt templates and integrating into CI/CD pipelines to prevent regressions.

Everything runs locally in your browser — no uploads, accounts, API keys or backend required.

Most tools give you a history report OR a price estimate. CarScorer combines reliability, recalls, and pricing into one buy / don't-buy answer. Free, no account needed for a basic check.

makers.name: Brady Schulz - CarScorer.com

Pulls live noise, traffic, crime, subway, and event data to show what's actually good right now (green = great, red = skip it). NYC is just the first city — plan to expand from here. Built solo as a student. Would love feedback, especially from people who know NYC well enough to sanity-check the scores.

posts.name: gogitype
posts.tagline: Typing practice that finds and fixes your weak keys
posts.description: Most typing tests tell you how fast you are. gogitype tells you why you aren't faster. It analyzes per-keystroke timing to find context-dependent weak spots (like being slow at 'r' only after 'e'), builds drills from real words containing your problem patterns, and retires each drill once the data shows you've fixed it. Finger heatmaps, rhythm training with a metronome, multiplayer races and a co-op arcade mode. Free, no ads, works offline, no account needed to try.

posts.name: Fate Engine
posts.tagline: Turn everyday decisions into memorable reveals
posts.description: Most random picker apps focus on getting a result as quickly as possible.Fate Engine takes a different approach. Instead of revealing the answer immediately, it adds a little anticipation and fun to the process through different ways of revealing the result. Whether you're making everyday decisions, playing games, or spending time with friends, each choice becomes a little more enjoyable. Choose from wheels, ritual card draws, balloon reveals, multiplayer touch selection, dice, and more.

posts.name: SoPoet
posts.tagline: Share a short poem and a photo on this calmer social site
posts.description: SoPoet is a creative community built around the simple idea of slowing down. Rather than chasing likes, trends and endless feeds, you pair a photograph with a poem of at most seven lines to create a poetgraph. No algorithm, no infinite scroll. Likes are sparks, comments are glosses, and a poem landing on 5,7,5 is recognised as a haiku and badged, as are tanka, cinquain and the Fib. A word of the day nudges you when stuck, and a streak counts the days you write. Join now for the 'Inkling' title.

posts.name: Yield — Investment Calculator
posts.tagline: Compound interest calculator that actually makes sense
posts.description: YIELD is a compound interest calculator that actually feels good to use.Type in your deposit, rate, and top-ups, and watch a live chart show exactly how your money grows — period by period, down to the cent. What makes it different: a "cost of waiting" widget that shows what procrastinating costs you, a built-in Rent vs Buy comparison, and a Rule of 72 helper that explains itself instead of just showing a number. Dark/light themes, 15 languages, and one-tap sharing of your exact scenario via URL

posts.name: CareClarity

posts.description: CareClarity is a compliance support platform for Ofsted-regulated children's residential homes in England. It provides seven AI-powered tools that help registered managers and responsible individuals review and improve the quality of care documentation. The platform is aligned to the Children's Homes (England) Regulations 2015, the Social Care Common Inspection Framework (SCCIF) April 2026, and Working Together to Safeguard Children 2026. Document content is not stored.
